install.title: Install RentAI 24
install.description: Get the full app experience on your device:
install.nativeAppDesc: Opens in its own window — no browser tabs needed.
install.fastDesc: Launch instantly from your home screen or desktop.
install.upToDateDesc: Get quick access to your AI workforce anytime.

iosSafari.description: Follow these steps to add RentAI 24 to your home screen:
iosSafari.step1: Tap the Share button in the toolbar
iosSafari.step2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"

macosSafari.description: Follow these steps to add RentAI 24 to your Dock:
macosSafari.step1: Click File in the Safari menu bar

firefox.description: Firefox has limited PWA support. You can try:
firefox.step1: Tap the menu button (three dots) in the address bar
firefox.step2: Look for "Install" or "Add to Home Screen"
firefox.tip: Tip: For the best experience, open this site in Chrome, Edge, or Safari to install the app natively.

other.description: To install this app, try one of the following:
other.lookForInstall: Look for an install icon in your browser's address bar or menu
other.openInBrowser: Or open this site in Chrome, Edge, or Safari for the best install experience

install.guideDescription: Your browser doesn't support automatic installation. Follow the steps below:

footer.tagline: Rent AI, 24/7. Pre-trained AI agents ready to join your team today.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get the latest on AI workforce trends and product updates.
footer.errorDesc: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.

language.label: Language
language.preferenceDesc: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
language.savedDesc: The interface language has been updated.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie & Privacy Notice
